name: S-JTSK

datum.name: System of the Unified Trigonometrical Cadastral Network

remarks: Greenwich-referenced equivalent to S-JTSK (CRS code 4818). Technically improved and replaced through S-JTSK [JTSK03] in Slovakia, CRS code 8351. Remains the legal system in Czechia but see scientific working system CRSs 5228 and 5229.
